_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Both GFAP (an activated muller cell marker) and CD45 (immune cell marker) expressions were lower than the isotype control used
details: GFAP and CD45 expressions were lower than isotype control, indicating C6 cells do not express these markers
